leadText: The Sweet Heart (Japanese: ハートスイーツ Heart Sweets) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation V. It is a heart-shaped chocolate that restores a Pokémon's HP.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Manual activation [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 20 HP . Exchange [ edit | edit source ] In Mistralton City , the player can give a woman ten Sweet Hearts in exchange for a Heart Scale . In Pokémon Black 2 and White 2, on Valentine's Day (February 14) and White Day (March 14), the woman will allow the exchange for only five Sweet Hearts.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 Very sweet chocolate. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by only 20 points. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A piece of cloyingly sweet chocolate. When consumed, it restores 20 HP to an injured Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA A piece of cloyingly sweet chocolate. It can be used to restore 20 HP to a single Pokémon. S V A piece of cloyingly sweet chocolate. It can be used to restore 20 HP to a Pokémon.
